D1 Optics L3 Apply Atom

Retroreflection from a Corner Cube

send a ray into a 90° corner and watch it return exactly parallel to its incoming direction

Two reflections off perpendicular walls flip both velocity components — every incoming ray returns exactly parallel and opposite, regardless of incidence angle.

Slide θ from 5° to 80°. The crimson outgoing ray always exits parallel to the dashed gold reference (the reversed incoming direction).
